chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 226 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.03.2025 For orders on MA 1716/25 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 1717/25 For hearing of main case Mr. Koura Khan Memon, Advocate along with Applicant Applicant Mst. Baby Fahmida seeks protective bail in FIR No. 377 of 2024 registered at Police Station A-Section Dadu for offences punishable under Sections 93(a) CNS Act. Learned Counsel submits that the Applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case due to mala fide intention and ulterior motives; that the Applicant is law abiding citizen and intends to appear before the Trial Court but he feels apprehension of her arrest at the hands of police in order to humiliate and disgrace her; therefore, she needs protection in order to enable her to appear before the Trial Court. Without touching merits of the case, the Applicant is granted protective bail for five days subject to her furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Thirty Thousand only) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days or whenever he surrenders herself before the Trial Court whichever is earlier. This Cr. Bail Application along with pending applications stands disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
